creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Well, let's go to Starbucks on our way to work. Yeah, man, I'll get the turkey bacon egg white sandwich with the egg white bites and then a grande americano with the sugar-free vanilla syrup and a splash of almond milk. Okay, cool. But actually, what if we went to Dunkin' instead? What would you order there? Yeah, I'll get the turkey sausage wake-up wrap with the egg white bites and then let's do a cold brew with sugar-free vanilla and a splash of almond milk. Dang, man, how do you always know what to order? Bro, are you not following Seth G. yet? Well, damn, I better make sure to follow Seth G. right now.
caption:
Comment "FASTFOOD" for my FREE fast food swap cheat sheet

Steal these 2 orders from Starbucks & Dunkin' Donuts to stay on track with your fitness journey

Starbucks:
Turkey bacon egg white sandwich + egg white bites + Grande Americano with sugar free vanilla and splash of almond milk
(410 calories 34 G protein)

Dunkin' Donuts:
Turkey sausage wake-up wrap + egg white bites + cold brew with sugar free vanilla and splash of almond milk
(380 calories 34 G protein)

Both these orders will save you over 1000 calories and keep you on track
ocr_summary: Starbucks: 1330 cal / 35g protein (original) vs 410 cal / 34g protein (swap). Dunkin Donuts: 1150 cal / 30g protein (original) vs 380 cal / 24g protein (swap).

swaps.original_meal: Typical Starbucks coffee order (implied high-calorie drink + pastry)
swaps.swap_meal: Turkey bacon egg white sandwich + egg white bites + Grande Americano with sugar free vanilla and splash of almond milk

swaps.original_meal: Typical Dunkin order (implied high-calorie drink + donut/pastry)
swaps.swap_meal: Turkey sausage wake-up wrap + egg white bites + cold brew with sugar free vanilla and splash of almond milk

parsed.notes: Two coffee shop breakfast swaps in one reel. Both show dramatic calorie savings (920 cal and 770 cal respectively). Caption says 34g protein for Dunkin swap but OCR shows 24g - caption likely more accurate.
